title: The Huntress Feeding Manual
description: A quick-reference guide for cooking meals that are safe and enjoyable for the Huntress.

sections.title: Gluten Sensitivity
sections.description: The Huntress is highly gluten sensitive and close to being gluten intolerant.
notes: Gluten should be avoided where possible.
Some gluten foods cause stronger reactions than others.
Large gluten meals may trigger a 'gluten coma'.
Symptoms may include bloating, fatigue and digestive discomfort.

sections.title: IBS Considerations
sections.description: IBS is generally manageable but can be influenced heavily by stress and anxiety.
notes: Certain foods can cause bloating or cramping.
Simple meals are often easier to tolerate.
Overripe bananas mainly reserved for banana bread.

sections.title: Shopping Notes
notes: Watch for hidden gluten in sauces and spice blends.
